display.purpose: Page titles only — one per screen.

body.purpose: All reading text; cap prose at 65-75ch.

label.purpose: UI labels, button text, form labels, table headers.

shadows.name: resting-card
shadows.purpose: Default for cards, tables, panels at rest.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Indigo focus halo on inputs, selects, focusable controls.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (no bounce).

breakpoints.name: narrow
breakpoints.purpose: Sidebar collapses; detail view stacks to one column.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary action per context — Institutional Indigo fill.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">บันทึกลงทะเบียน</button>

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: The common neutral action — white fill, indigo text, gray border.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-secondary">ดาวน์โหลดเอกสาร</button>

components.name: Danger Button
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-danger">ลบเอกสารออกจากทะเบียน</button>

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Labelled field with focus halo; red border on error.

components.name: Select
components.description: Native select restyled to match Input, with custom chevron.

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Document-control state — fixed vocabulary, pill with leading dot. Shown: Effective.

components.name: Document-Type Tag
components.description: 2-letter mono code chip, color-coded by document family. Shown: FM (form).
components.html: FMแบบฟอร์มบันทึก

components.name: Card
components.description: Default content surface — white on slate page, soft resting shadow, optional header.
components.html:
ไฟล์แนบเอกสาร
เนื้อหาในการ์ด — ตารางหรือฟอร์ม

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Underline tabs for switching register views; active = indigo underline + label, with mono count chip.

components.name: Sidebar Header
components.description: Modernized top-left sidebar header with responsive layout, bottom border-light glow, logo hover elevation, seal micro-rotation, and dynamic text-gradient color shift.
components.html:
ห้องปฏิบัติการ
เทคนิคการแพทย์
รพ.ธรรมศาสตร์เฉลิมพระเกียรติ
components.css: .ds-sidebar-logo-header { padding: 16px 18px 14px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle,#E0E2EC); cursor: pointer; background: transparent; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(.2,0,.13,1); position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .ds-sidebar-logo-header::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 2px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--brand-300,#B4BBEE), transparent); transform: scaleX(0); transition: transform 180ms cubic-bezier(.2,0,.13,1); } .ds-sidebar-logo-header:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); } .ds-sidebar-logo-header:hover { background: var(--slate-50,#F6F7FB); } .ds-logo-box-modern { width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--brand-50,#F1F2FC); display: grid; place-items: center; flex-shrink: 0; border: 1.5px solid var(--brand-100,#E3E6F9); position: relative; transition: transform 180ms cubic-bezier(.2,0,.13,1), box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(.2,0,.13,1), border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(.2,0,.13,1); } .ds-logo-box-modern img { width: 36px; height: 36px; object-fit: contain; transition: transform 180ms cubic-bezier(.2,0,.13,1); } .ds-sidebar-logo-header:hover .ds-logo-box-modern { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 18px -8px rgba(52,62,155,.35); border-color: var(--brand-400,#8893E3); } .ds-sidebar-logo-header:hover .ds-logo-box-modern img { transform: scale(1.08) rotate(5deg); } .ds-logo-text-title { font-family: var(--font-display,'Anuphan'); font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.25; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--brand-900,#1B2152) 0%, var(--brand-600,#4250BC) 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(.2,0,.13,1); } .ds-sidebar-logo-header:hover .ds-logo-text-title { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--brand-800,#262E73) 0%, var(--accent-600,#DD5236) 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; } .ds-logo-text-subtitle { font-family: var(--font-body,'Sarabun'); font-weight: 500; font-size: 10.5px; line-height: 1.2; color: var(--text-secondary,#54596F); margin-top: 2px; transition: color 180ms cubic-bezier(.2,0,.13,1); } .ds-sidebar-logo-header:hover .ds-logo-text-subtitle { color: var(--text-primary,#181B2A); }

components.name: Inline PDF Viewer
components.description: Card-based inline iframe container that streams PDF files directly without tab redirects. Contains a top toolbar, dynamic title, and close control.
components.html: คู่มือคุณภาพ (QM-LAB-001).pdf
components.css: .ds-pdf-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid var(--border-default,#C4C8D6); border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(15,26,30,.08),0 1px 2px rgba(15,26,30,.05); overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; width: 100%; height: 500px; } .ds-pdf-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 12px 18px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle,#E0E2EC); background: var(--slate-50,#F6F7FB); } .ds-pdf-title { font: 600 .875rem/1.2 'Sarabun',system-ui,sans-serif; color: var(--text-primary,#181B2A); } .ds-pdf-close { background: transparent; border: none; font-size: 20px; cursor: pointer; color: var(--text-tertiary,#70758C); padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 4px; transition: background 120ms; } .ds-pdf-close:hover { background: var(--slate-100,#EEEFF5); color: var(--text-primary,#181B2A); } .ds-pdf-body { flex: 1; position: relative; background: var(--slate-800,#262A3D); } .ds-pdf-iframe { width: 100%; height: 100%; border: none; }

narrative.northStar: The Controlled Register (ทะเบียนควบคุม)
narrative.overview: The interface of a controlled document register, not a marketing surface. Every screen behaves like a well-kept ISO 15189 logbook: precise, legible, traceable — each document carries a control number, status, revision count, and visible history. Identity comes from the hospital seal: an Institutional Indigo ring carries brand and primary action, a Seal Coral warms it for rare emphasis. Surfaces are soft and lightly dimensional — white cards lift off a cool slate page on quiet shadows. The tool disappears into the task.
keyCharacteristics: Indigo-and-coral identity drawn directly from the hospital laboratory seal.
Document-control vocabulary (status, revision, owner, history) always visible and consistent.
Fixed type scale, Thai-first fonts (Anuphan + Sarabun), mono for codes.
Cool slate neutrals; white cards on a slate page with soft, functional shadows.
High contrast and tablet-ready by default — legibility is non-negotiable.

rules.name: The Coral Restraint Rule
rules.body: Seal Coral appears on ≤10% of any screen and never on a default action. If a coral button and an indigo button sit side by side as equals, one is wrong — indigo is the system's voice, coral is the exception.

rules.name: The Status-Is-Sacred Rule
rules.body: The six document-control colors are a fixed vocabulary, not a palette to borrow from. A colored pill in this system always means a controlled state; never reuse status tints for decoration.

rules.name: The Mono-for-Machines Rule
rules.body: Anything the system generates or controls — document numbers, revisions, dates, counts — is set in IBM Plex Mono. Human-authored content is Sarabun.

rules.name: The Fixed-Scale Rule
rules.body: This is product UI, not a landing page. Type sizes are fixed rem, never fluid clamp(); a heading must not shrink when it lands in a sidebar.

rules.name: The Lift-On-Intent Rule
rules.body: Surfaces rest on the resting-card shadow and rise only as a response to intent (hover, focus, open). A card elevated at rest with no interaction is over-shadowed.

dos: Do use Institutional Indigo (#343E9B) as the one primary-action voice; keep Seal Coral to ≤10% of any screen for genuine emphasis only.
Do set body text in Ink (#181B2A) and reserve Slate Tertiary (#70758C) for captions on white only — keep body contrast at WCAG AA (≥4.5:1).
Do keep the six document-control status colors as a sacred, fixed vocabulary; a colored pill always means a controlled state.
Do set all system-generated data (document numbers, revisions, dates, counts) in IBM Plex Mono so it reads as machine data.
Do rest surfaces on the soft resting-card shadow and lift only on intent (hover/focus/open).
Do keep the same control vocabulary on every screen and design responsively for lab tablets (collapse the sidebar, let tables scroll).

Do split long Thai titles like 'ห้องปฏิบัติการเทคนิคการแพทย์' using
to ensure predictable syllable-breaking in narrow sidebars.
Do revoke temporary attachment Object URLs on close or unmount to avoid memory leaks.
donts: Don't make it look like an old government web system — no dated dense tables without hierarchy, no raw system fonts, no muddy color.
Don't let it feel toy-like or unserious; this is an official document register.
Don't cram every field into one view without hierarchy — clutter erodes trust and findability.
Don't import marketing-SaaS tropes: no loud gradients as decoration, no big hero-metric cards, no ad-like exuberance.
Don't use gradient text on content fields, decorative glassmorphism, or border-left/border-right colored side-stripes on cards, alerts, or list items.
Don't reuse status tints for non-status decoration, and don't swap a button's color on hover — darken with brightness instead.
Don't use fluid clamp() heading sizes or nest cards inside cards.
Don't load PDF files by forcing an external tab redirect when inline streaming within a Card-iframe is possible.
